title: Celestial
body:
![Large Logo of Celestial](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbc606e0eae4aa8a2ee6de3c9f37b77ef1dbf321.png)
### **A Minecraft mod about adding new space themed stuff**
This mod is centred around the wonders of the night sky! Craft fluffy marshmallows to roast over a warm campfire, gaze up at the shooting stars as they rain down upon your world, and discover many more magical features inspired by the beauty of the cosmos! 🌟

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YujXSyYH8Uc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>

## Gallery

![Stargazing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd08c8cca5ce08c9becfdc835364665c1c0f7aa0.webp)

![Freefall Potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4398e8f4795f774d8bc7ccebc45e49b87c60d55e.png)

![Roasting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c91f33169d92b57bed771e27af5e9d7c38181a74.png)

## Current features:
- Craftable **Marshmallows** with a vanilla-friendly Recipe!
- Marshmallow on a stick - grants the player the ability to **roast their marshmallows**.
  Roasting becomes a fun minigame in order to get the best type of marshmallow: **Perfectly Roasted**!
- By roasting over a **soul campfire**, the marshmallow gains unique properties that allow it to summon the **starfall event** when eaten at night!
- The **Starfall Event**, which when summoned during night causes falling stars to rain down on your world ranging from Starfall I-II depending on the roasted level of the consumed marshmallow
- **Star Item** which can be used to craft **Star Wool**, a decorative block like purple wool, and **Star banner pattern** which is, well a star banner pattern!
- Custom useable **cushions** that match greatly with the vanilla art style of Minecraft, with a vanilla-friendly recipe! Perfect for creating seats for players across your world.
- A Custom **Star** banner pattern - upgrading banner art capabilities significantly
- Moon Cheese and Pizza that give you a brand new effect, **Freefall** is a effect that gives you low gravity, just like you're in space!
<details>
<summary>Q&A</summary>

Q. **May I use this in a modpack?**

**Yes, you may,** I do ask that **you leave credits** somewhere in the modpack if you're uploading it online.

Q. **Can I port this mod to Fabric/Quilt?**

**Yes,** please ask before doing though as **I would like to be a featured member on the mod page.**

Q. **Can I port this mod to Forge?**

**No,** I do not feel comfortable with my mod ported to forge.

Q. **Can you backport this mod?**

**No,** I will not be backporting any of my mods and **I do not feel comfortable with my mods being backported either**

Q. **Can I port this mod to Bedrock?**

**Yes,** you may backport this mod to Bedrock, however, **please ask me about distributing the mod before doing so.**

Q. **When will you update to?**

**Wait.** Literally just wait, I mod for fun in my free time as a hobby, I will update when i want to.

Dm ***Lysticqx*** On discord for questions.
</details>
